plugins.name: meta-docs
plugins.description: Four composable skills for managing meta-documentation about a codebase: meta-doc-manager (SQLite index of topics, modules, and documents), write-meta-doc (authors new docs and registers them), process-meta-doc (consumes registered docs for Q&A and review-finding triage), and todo-manager (AI-native todo tracking with priority, status, assignment, and blocking).
